answer:
<think> The FIFA U-20 World Cup is held every two years, and the 2007 edition was the sixteenth edition. Since the first FIFA U-20 World Cup was held in 1977, we can calculate the year of the 2007 edition by multiplying 2 (the frequency of the tournament) by 15 (the edition number minus one) and adding 1977. This gives us 1977 + (2 * 15) = 2007. The 2007 FIFA U-20 World Cup was held in Canada. Sergio Agüero was given the FIFA U-20 Golden Shoe in the 2005 FIFA U-20 World Cup, which was held in the Netherlands. Therefore, the 2007 FIFA U-20 World Cup was held in Canada, and the question asks for the dates of the tournament, not the winner of the Golden Shoe. The 2007 FIFA U-20 World Cup was held from June 30 to July 19, 2007. </think>
<answer> June 30 to July 19, 2007 </answer>
